_comment: GitHub App manifest for the Sammy SDLC dispatcher. Drives event-driven dispatch (docs/agentic-sdlc/onboarding/event-driven-dispatch.md). Create via the App-manifest flow (see SETUP.md). project_v2_item events are ORG-level — install on the org, not a single repo. NEVER commit the generated private key / webhook secret — store them per SETUP.md.
name: sammy-sdlc-dispatcher
description: Event-driven dispatcher for the Sammy autonomous SDLC loop: GitHub board/PR events wake the one owning standing seat. Single board reader + reconcile backstop. No polling.
